item.title: LOL u don’t judge?
item.description:
LOL u don’t judge? Really? Bc we all are when ur releasing cutsy videos to recruit for a t*rrorist org

item.title: It is because instead of teaching you how to actually maintain a healthy relationship they are often teaching you what they thin...
item.description:
It is because instead of teaching you how to actually maintain a healthy relationship they are often teaching you what they think an ideal partner would want and of course those ideas are not yours#greenscreenvideo

item.title: They are not confessing, they are bragging
item.description:
They are not confessing, they are bragging. Soemthing I will never stop thinking about when I see open war criminals brag abt thier war crimes

item.title: If you can’t tell, I REALLY don’t liek or respect nos tishby, but now that the people who ALWAYS claim we are going after childr...
item.description:
If you can’t tell, I REALLY don’t liek or respect nos tishby, but now that the people who ALWAYS claim we are going after children, are themselves going after children, I’m absolutly dying in hypocrisy



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: As I repeat: if you are going to claim that people are forced or coerced or required through social or economic forces to join, ...
item.description:
As I repeat: if you are going to claim that people are forced or coerced or required through social or economic forces to join, you should join me in criticising every single person who doesn’t join for that reason or attempts to use this position to silence descent



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
